## X-Sense Home Security v1.3.4

### 📷 Camera Live View
- Restores device-backed camera live view to use the camera device record directly without requiring a parent station availability gate.
- Keeps station-backed cameras unchanged while still avoiding duplicate camera entities when the same camera appears in station and device data.
- Keeps native Home Assistant WebRTC signaling on the camera's own X-Sense serial number, matching the Android app ticket flow.

### 🔔 Camera AI Notifications
- Fixes the Camera AI Detection blueprint default action so it can be imported without evaluating a `trigger` template during setup.
- Keeps the blueprint selector focused on X-Sense event entities for supported camera AI notifications.

### 🛠️ Diagnostics and Reliability
- Keeps WebRTC debug logging sanitized while preserving ticket shape, stream capability, signal event, and ICE candidate counts needed for troubleshooting.
- Updates the release workflow so standard versioned release notes are used for `v` tags.
